metadata.emotional_engine: Fear of being laughed at for getting something wrong
metadata.curiosity_hook: Will Sami manage to hide his fear before everyone notices?

story_pages.text_arabic: فِي صَبَاحِ يَوْمِ الثُّلَاثَاءِ، وَقَفَ سَامِي فِي سَاحَةِ الْمَدْرَسَةِ وَنَظَرَ إِلَى الشَّبَكَةِ الْجَدِيدَةِ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: On Tuesday morning, Sami stood in the school playground and looked at the new net.
story_pages.illustration_note: Wide shot of the school playground. Sami stands alone near a volleyball net, hood half-up, looking uncertain. Other kids play in the background.

story_pages.text_arabic: قَالَ أُسْتَاذُ نَبِيلٌ بِصَوْتِهِ الْعَمِيقِ: «الْيَوْمَ، سَنَلْعَبُ الْكُرَةَ الطَّائِرَةَ.»
story_pages.text_english_literal: Ustadh Nabil said in his deep voice: 'Today, we will play volleyball.'
story_pages.illustration_note: Ustadh Nabil towering over the children, his owl features formal but not unkind. Children look excited. Sami's eyes are wide.

story_pages.text_arabic: فَرِحَ الْجَمِيعُ. صَفَّقَتْ لَيَانُ. قَفَزَ طَارِقٌ. لَكِنَّ سَامِي سَحَبَ غِطَاءَ رَأْسِهِ قَلِيلًا.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Everyone cheered. Layan clapped. Tariq jumped. But Sami pulled his hood down a little.
story_pages.illustration_note: Split reaction: Layan clapping with competitive fire, Tariq mid-jump with arms up, and Sami in the corner pulling his red hood lower.

story_pages.text_arabic: سَامِي لَمْ يَلْعَبِ الْكُرَةَ الطَّائِرَةَ مِنْ قَبْلُ. مَاذَا لَوْ ضَرَبَ الْكُرَةَ وَطَارَتْ فِي الاتِّجَاهِ الْخَطَأِ؟ مَاذَا لَوْ ضَحِكَ الْجَمِيعُ؟
story_pages.text_english_literal: Sami had never played volleyball before. What if he hit the ball and it flew the wrong way? What if everyone laughed?
story_pages.illustration_note: Close-up on Sami's worried face, thought bubbles showing a volleyball flying wildly while kids point and laugh.

story_pages.text_arabic: جَاءَ طَارِقٌ رَاكِضًا. «سَامِي! أَنَا وَأَنْتَ فِي فَرِيقٍ وَاحِدٍ! سَنَسْحَقُهُمْ!»
story_pages.text_english_literal: Tariq came running. 'Sami! You and I are on the same team! We'll crush them!'
story_pages.illustration_note: Tariq rushing toward Sami with his backwards green cap, arm around Sami's shoulder, big grin. Sami manages a weak smile.

story_pages.text_arabic: أَرَادَ سَامِي أَنْ يَقُولَ: «أَنَا لَا أَعْرِفُ كَيْفَ أَلْعَبُ.» لَكِنَّ الْكَلِمَاتِ عَلِقَتْ فِي حَلْقِهِ مِثْلَ حَبَّةِ حَلْوَى كَبِيرَةٍ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Sami wanted to say: 'I don't know how to play.' But the words stuck in his throat like a big piece of candy.
story_pages.illustration_note: Sami with mouth slightly open, hand on throat, looking conflicted. Tariq already running toward the net.

story_pages.text_arabic: بَدَأَتِ الْمُبَارَاةُ. طَارَتِ الْكُرَةُ فَوْقَ الشَّبَكَةِ. ضَرَبَتْهَا لَيَانُ بِقُوَّةٍ. ضَرَبَهَا طَارِقٌ بِرَأْسِهِ — وَهَذَا لَيْسَ مِنَ الْقَوَاعِدِ أَصْلًا.
story_pages.text_english_literal: The game started. The ball flew over the net. Layan hit it hard. Tariq hit it with his head — which isn't even in the rules.
story_pages.illustration_note: Action scene: volleyball mid-air, Layan in a powerful stance, Tariq headbutting the ball with a goofy expression. Other kids laughing.

story_pages.text_arabic: وَسَامِي؟ وَقَفَ فِي الْخَلْفِ، يَتَمَنَّى أَنْ تَكُونَ الْكُرَةُ مَشْغُولَةً بِالْآخَرِينَ إِلَى الْأَبَدِ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: And Sami? He stood in the back, wishing the ball would stay busy with the others forever.
story_pages.illustration_note: Sami standing far back on his side of the court, small figure against the playground. Everyone else is engaged with the ball.

story_pages.text_arabic: ثُمَّ حَدَثَ مَا كَانَ يَخَافُ مِنْهُ. صَاحَ طَارِقٌ: «سَامِي! الْكُرَةُ لَكَ!»
story_pages.text_english_literal: Then the thing he feared happened. Tariq shouted: 'Sami! The ball is yours!'
story_pages.illustration_note: The volleyball arcing through the air directly toward Sami. Tariq pointing. All eyes turning to Sami.

story_pages.text_arabic: نَظَرَ سَامِي إِلَى الْكُرَةِ. نَظَرَتِ الْكُرَةُ إِلَى سَامِي. عَلَى الْأَقَلِّ هَذَا مَا شَعَرَ بِهِ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Sami looked at the ball. The ball looked at Sami. At least that's what it felt like.
story_pages.illustration_note: Dramatic close-up: Sami and the volleyball facing each other, the ball almost cartoon-like in its intensity. A moment of frozen tension.

story_pages.text_arabic: ضَرَبَ الْكُرَةَ بِكِلْتَا يَدَيْهِ. طَارَتِ الْكُرَةُ... إِلَى الْأَعْلَى. عَالِيًا جِدًّا. ثُمَّ سَقَطَتْ... عَلَى رَأْسِهِ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: He hit the ball with both hands. The ball flew... upward. Very high. Then it fell... on his head.
story_pages.illustration_note: Comic sequence: Sami hitting the ball straight up, then the ball bonking him on the head. His hood falls back.

story_pages.text_arabic: ضَحِكَ بَعْضُ الْأَطْفَالِ. شَعَرَ سَامِي أَنَّ وَجْهَهُ أَصْبَحَ سَاخِنًا مِثْلَ مِقْلَاةِ بَابَا كَرِيمٍ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Some children laughed. Sami felt his face become hot like Baba Karim's frying pan.
story_pages.illustration_note: Sami's face bright red, steam almost visible. A few kids giggling in the background. Sami's hood is down, leaving him exposed.

story_pages.text_arabic: قَالَتْ لَيَانُ: «لَازِمْ تَضْرِبُهَا لِلْأَمَامِ، مُو لِلسَّقْفِ!» لَمْ تَكُنْ تَقْصِدُ أَنْ تَكُونَ قَاسِيَةً. لَكِنَّ الْكَلِمَاتِ لَسَعَتْ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: 'You have to hit it forward, not at the ceiling!' Layan said. She didn't mean to be harsh. But the words stung.
story_pages.illustration_note: Layan gesturing forward with her hands, matter-of-fact expression. Sami flinching slightly at her directness.

story_pages.text_arabic: فَكَّرَ سَامِي: «سَأُصْلِحُ الْأَمْرَ. سَأَضْرِبُ الْكُرَةَ الْقَادِمَةَ بِقُوَّةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ حَتَّى يَنْسَى الْجَمِيعُ.»
story_pages.text_english_literal: Sami thought: 'I'll fix this. I'll hit the next ball so hard that everyone forgets.'
story_pages.illustration_note: Sami with a determined face, fists clenched. A thought bubble showing him spiking the ball heroically.

story_pages.text_arabic: جَاءَتِ الْكُرَةُ مَرَّةً أُخْرَى. رَكَضَ سَامِي. قَفَزَ. ضَرَبَ الْكُرَةَ بِكُلِّ قُوَّتِهِ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: The ball came again. Sami ran. Jumped. Hit the ball with all his strength.
story_pages.illustration_note: Dynamic action shot of Sami mid-leap, arms swinging at the volleyball. Intense effort on his face.

story_pages.text_arabic: طَارَتِ الْكُرَةُ فَوْقَ الشَّبَكَةِ... وَفَوْقَ الْمَلْعَبِ... وَفَوْقَ السُّورِ... وَاخْتَفَتْ فِي الشَّارِعِ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: The ball flew over the net... and over the court... and over the wall... and disappeared into the street.
story_pages.illustration_note: Wide shot tracking the volleyball's arc: over the net, over the playground wall, disappearing into the street beyond. Kids staring in shock.

story_pages.text_arabic: صَمَتَ الْجَمِيعُ. حَتَّى طَارِقٌ لَمْ يَجِدْ مَا يَقُولُهُ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Everyone went silent. Even Tariq couldn't find anything to say.
story_pages.illustration_note: Frozen tableau: all the children standing still, mouths open. Tariq's cap slightly askew. Total silence.

story_pages.text_arabic: أَرَادَ سَامِي أَنْ يَخْتَفِيَ. أَرَادَ أَنْ يَكُونَ صَغِيرًا جِدًّا مِثْلَ نَمْلَةٍ وَيَنْزَلِقَ تَحْتَ السُّورِ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Sami wanted to disappear. He wanted to be very small like an ant and slip under the wall.
story_pages.illustration_note: Sami shrinking, looking at the ground. A tiny imagined version of himself as an ant near the wall base.

story_pages.text_arabic: ثُمَّ سَمِعَ صَوْتًا. كَانَ طَارِقٌ... يَضْحَكُ. لَيْسَ ضَحِكًا عَلَيْهِ. بَلْ ضَحِكًا مُنْدَهِشًا.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Then he heard a sound. It was Tariq... laughing. Not laughing at him. But laughing in amazement.
story_pages.illustration_note: Tariq with genuine amazement on his face, mouth wide open in a laugh of wonder, not mockery.

story_pages.text_arabic: «يَا سَامِي! هَلْ رَأَيْتُمْ أَيْنَ وَصَلَتِ الْكُرَةُ؟! هَذِهِ أَقْوَى ضَرْبَةٍ فِي تَارِيخِ الْمَدْرَسَةِ!»
story_pages.text_english_literal: 'Sami! Did you all see where the ball went?! That's the strongest hit in school history!'
story_pages.illustration_note: Tariq pointing toward the wall where the ball disappeared, turning to the other kids with theatrical excitement.

story_pages.text_arabic: ضَحِكَتْ لَيَانُ. «صَحِيحٌ، لَكِنَّهَا فِي الاتِّجَاهِ الْغَلَطِ!» ثُمَّ ابْتَسَمَتْ. «لَكِنْ... الْقُوَّةُ مَوْجُودَةٌ.»
story_pages.text_english_literal: Layan laughed. 'True, but it went the wrong way!' Then she smiled. 'But... the power is there.'
story_pages.illustration_note: Layan trying to stay serious but breaking into a smile. Her competitive eyes show a glint of respect.

story_pages.text_arabic: جَلَسَ سَامِي عَلَى الْحَائِطِ الْمُنْخَفِضِ. لَمْ يَكُنْ مُسْتَعِدًّا لِلضَّحِكِ بَعْدُ. كَانَتْ أُذُنَاهُ لَا تَزَالَانِ سَاخِنَتَيْنِ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Sami sat on the low wall. He wasn't ready to laugh yet. His ears were still hot.
story_pages.illustration_note: Sami sitting on the snack wall alone, head slightly down. The other kids are visible but at a distance, resuming play.

story_pages.text_arabic: جَاءَ طَارِقٌ وَجَلَسَ بِجَانِبِهِ. لَمْ يَقُلْ شَيْئًا فِي الْبِدَايَةِ. فَقَطْ أَخْرَجَ بِسْكُوِيتَةً مِنْ جَيْبِهِ وَقَسَمَهَا نِصْفَيْنِ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Tariq came and sat next to him. He didn't say anything at first. He just took a cookie from his pocket and broke it in half.
story_pages.illustration_note: Intimate moment: Tariq and Sami on the low wall, Tariq breaking a cookie in half. Quiet, warm, no words needed.

story_pages.text_arabic: قَالَ طَارِقٌ بِفَمِهِ الْمُمْتَلِئِ: «أَتَعْرِفُ، أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ لَعِبْتُ كُرَةَ قَدَمٍ، رَكَلْتُ الْكُرَةَ فِي الْمَرْمَى الْغَلَطِ.»
story_pages.text_english_literal: Tariq said with his full mouth: 'You know, the first time I played soccer, I kicked the ball into the wrong goal.'
story_pages.illustration_note: Close-up of Tariq talking with crumbs on his mouth, gesturing casually. Sami listening, the tension in his shoulders starting to ease.

story_pages.text_arabic: نَظَرَ إِلَيْهِ سَامِي. «حَقًّا؟» قَالَ طَارِقٌ: «حَقًّا. وَالْجَمِيعُ صَفَّقُوا... لِلْفَرِيقِ الْآخَرِ.»
story_pages.text_english_literal: Sami looked at him. 'Really?' Tariq said: 'Really. And everyone clapped... for the other team.'
story_pages.illustration_note: Sami turning to look at Tariq with surprise. Tariq grinning sheepishly at the memory.

story_pages.text_arabic: ضَحِكَ سَامِي. ضَحْكَةً صَغِيرَةً هَادِئَةً. ثُمَّ ضَحْكَةً أَكْبَرَ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Sami laughed. A small quiet laugh. Then a bigger one.
story_pages.illustration_note: Two-panel feel: first a tiny smile on Sami's face, then a genuine laugh. His hood is still down and he doesn't mind.

story_pages.text_arabic: قَالَ سَامِي: «لَكِنَّنِي فِعْلًا لَا أَعْرِفُ كَيْفَ أَلْعَبُ.» قَالَهَا أَخِيرًا. وَكَانَتْ أَسْهَلَ مِمَّا تَوَقَّعَ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Sami said: 'But I really don't know how to play.' He finally said it. And it was easier than he expected.
story_pages.illustration_note: Sami looking relieved, shoulders down, speaking openly to Tariq. The weight visibly lifted.

story_pages.text_arabic: قَفَزَ طَارِقٌ. «مُمْتَازٌ! أَنَا سَأُعَلِّمُكَ! خُطْوَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ: اضْرِبِ الْكُرَةَ لِلْأَمَامِ وَلَيْسَ لِلْفَضَاءِ الْخَارِجِيِّ!»
story_pages.text_english_literal: Tariq jumped up. 'Excellent! I'll teach you! Step one: hit the ball forward, not into outer space!'
story_pages.illustration_note: Tariq on his feet, coach-like pose with one finger up, oversized sneakers planted wide. Sami grinning.

story_pages.text_arabic: عَادَا إِلَى الْمَلْعَبِ. ضَرَبَ سَامِي الْكُرَةَ. لَمْ تَطِرْ بَعِيدًا. لَمْ تَكُنْ مِثَالِيَّةً. لَكِنَّهَا عَبَرَتِ الشَّبَكَةَ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: They went back to the court. Sami hit the ball. It didn't fly far. It wasn't perfect. But it crossed the net.
story_pages.illustration_note: The volleyball just barely clearing the net. Not a spectacular hit. Sami watching it with a small, satisfied expression.

story_pages.text_arabic: صَفَّقَ طَارِقٌ كَأَنَّ سَامِي فَازَ بِكَأْسِ الْعَالَمِ. ابْتَسَمَتْ لَيَانُ وَقَالَتْ: «أَحْسَنْتَ. الْمَرَّةُ الْقَادِمَةُ، أَقْوَى.»
story_pages.text_english_literal: Tariq clapped as if Sami had won the World Cup. Layan smiled and said: 'Good job. Next time, stronger.'
story_pages.illustration_note: Tariq applauding wildly, Layan giving a thumbs up with her competitive smile. Other kids resuming play naturally.

story_pages.text_arabic: فِي طَرِيقِ الْعَوْدَةِ إِلَى الْبَيْتِ، سَأَلَ سَامِي طَارِقًا: «هَلْ فِعْلًا رَكَلْتَ الْكُرَةَ فِي الْمَرْمَى الْغَلَطِ؟»
story_pages.text_english_literal: On the way home, Sami asked Tariq: 'Did you really kick the ball into the wrong goal?'
story_pages.illustration_note: The two friends walking home through the narrow Zuqaq alley, dappled light, relaxed posture.

story_pages.text_arabic: ضَحِكَ طَارِقٌ. «لَا. أَنَا اخْتَرَعْتُ الْقِصَّةَ.» ثُمَّ فَكَّرَ. «لَكِنْ كَانَ مُمْكِنًا يَصِيرُ.»
story_pages.text_english_literal: Tariq laughed. 'No. I made the story up.' Then he thought. 'But it could have happened.'
story_pages.illustration_note: Tariq laughing mischievously, hand behind his head. Sami shaking his head but smiling warmly.

story_pages.text_arabic: ضَحِكَ سَامِي وَرَفَعَ غِطَاءَ رَأْسِهِ قَلِيلًا. لَيْسَ لِأَنَّهُ خَائِفٌ. بَلْ لِأَنَّ الشَّمْسَ كَانَتْ فِي عَيْنَيْهِ.
story_pages.text_english_literal: Sami laughed and pulled his hood up a little. Not because he was scared. But because the sun was in his eyes.
story_pages.illustration_note: Final warm image: Sami walking with hood casually up, squinting at the golden sunset, smiling. Tariq beside him. The olive neighborhood glowing.
